---
title: "Contact"
page-layout: article
---

<form action="https://formspree.io/f/REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_ID" method="POST" class="contact-form">

<div class="mb-3">
  <label for="name" class="form-label">Name</label>
  <input type="text" id="name" name="name" class="form-control" placeholder="Your name" required>
</div>

<div class="mb-3">
  <label for="email" class="form-label">Email</label>
  <input type="email" id="email" name="email" class="form-control" placeholder="your@email.com" required>
</div>

<div class="mb-3">
  <label for="message" class="form-label">Message</label>
  <textarea id="message" name="message" class="form-control" rows="6" placeholder="Write your message here..." required></textarea>
</div>

<button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Send message</button>

</form>

<div class="contact-alt">

Or reach me directly at [abiyyusiregar@gmail.com](mailto:abiyyusiregar@gmail.com).

</div>
